pi_items.source: setup_task.sh docker-compose.yml ports section: '9080:80' - nginx listens on port 9080

README.md line 23 and task.json description: 'implementing network isolation with at least two separate networks (frontend and backend)' - nginx connects to both, app connects to both, redis only on backend
setup_task.sh docker-compose.yml services section (lines 112-131): defines exactly three services: nginx (image nginx:1.24-alpine), app (built from ./app), and redis (image redis:7-alpine)

privileged_info_summary: The task is a Docker Compose production hardening exercise for a three-service Flask/Nginx/Redis application. The application directory is /home/ga/webapp and must remain accessible at port 9080 after hardening. The required services are nginx, app, and redis. Network isolation requires frontend and backend networks with redis isolated to the backend network. All data is synthetic and generated during setup.
